issue.title: Feature request: add dark mode support to the dashboard
issue.body:
## Problem
The dashboard is always in light mode. Many users work at night and want a dark mode option.

## Proposed Solution
Add a toggle in the top-right corner to switch between light and dark themes. Persist the preference in localStorage.

## Acceptance Criteria
- A toggle button is visible in the header
- The dark theme applies to all pages
- The preference is persisted across sessions
